title: Shampoo Craft
description: A "Kitchen Sink" type modpack focused on Space,Automation and Destruction!
body:
### ShampooCraft
A modpack consisting of Space, The Aether, Automation and Destruction!

The Ultimate Goal of This Modpack Is To Automate Your Way To Colonising Planets And Dimensions And Using The Forces of Destruction To Stop Anyone In Your Way!

**Note:Quests are planned to be added in later updates**

**Also Note:At least 7 to 8 GBs of RAM allocation is recommended for this modpack**
